item.title: NVIDIA 推出 Nemotron 实验室，为企业提供可审核和拥有的开放 AI 模型
item.summary: NVIDIA launched Nemotron Labs on July 14, an open-model initiative showing enterprises and governments how to build auditable, customizable AI agents using the Nemotron family of open-weight models, with named adopters including Abridge, Glean, H Company and Harvey already deploying domain-specialized systems.
